reviews.comment:
Excelente atención por parte de los empleados, solo que ofrecían menu libre de parrilla y solo había costillas, el dueño muy mal educado porque no acepto sugerencias. No volvería. No lo recomiendo.

(Translated by Google)
The staff were excellent, but they advertised an all-you-can-eat grill menu and only had ribs. The owner was very rude and refused to accept suggestions. I wouldn't return. I don't recommend it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM3cmFta21BRRAB

reviews.comment:
La atención es buena, la comida es rica pero me quedé con ganas de comer algo de la parrilla. Llegamos con un grupo de amigas a las 22 horas y ya no había más que un par de chorizos y estaban haciendo unas costillas. El dueño un mal educado que no aceptó una sugerencia. No lo recomiendo. Sin dudas NO VOLVERIA

(Translated by Google)
The service is good, the food is tasty, but I was really looking forward to trying something from the grill. We arrived with a group of friends at 10 pm and there were only a couple of sausages left, and they were grilling ribs. The owner was rude and refused to accept a suggestion. I don't recommend it. I definitely WOULD NOT RETURN
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM3cmFuQWx3RRAB

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place, very organized. Immediate service at the fuel pump and buffet.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM3NnZuRFFBEAE

reviews.comment:
En mí caso son dos estrellas. Porque no me gustó la atención de las chicas dentro del Shop y el destrato. Paramos a almorzar algo, hoy 10/08/24 a las 13:30 hs aprox. Las empanadas con masa dura en los repulgues, las de carne secas como cartón, sin sabor, era carne hervida, horribles y las de jamón y queso, huecas sin relleno. Una verguenza. Deja mucho que desear un ACA en ruta. Donde el viajero, turista y socio necesita buena atencion. La infraestructura y limpieza de 10. Para almorzar recomiendo la Shell que está pegada al ACA. Se come de 10.

(Translated by Google)
In my case, it's two stars. Because I didn't like the service from the girls inside the shop and the poor treatment. We stopped for lunch today, August 10th, 2024, at approximately 1:30 PM. The empanadas had hard dough at the crimped edges, the beef ones were dry as cardboard, tasteless—it was boiled meat, awful—and the ham and cheese ones were hollow with no filling. A disgrace. This ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) on the road leaves much to be desired. Travelers, tourists, and members expect good service. The infrastructure and cleanliness are excellent. For lunch, I recommend the Shell station next to the ACA. The food is excellent.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURibjZPVGNBEAE
